mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in quarterly GDP growth signals strong economic demand, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days as corporate earnings prospects improve.
failure_condition: SPX 60-day returns in periods of GDP growth are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05) or GDP growth reverses to negative.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly decline in unemployment rate below 4.5% signals tightening labor markets, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days via wage inflation expectations.
failure_condition: SPX 20-day returns in periods of UNRATE < 4.5% are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05) or UNRATE fails to decline below 4.5%.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in industrial production and declining inflation indicates balanced supply-demand dynamics, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20-day returns in periods of INDPRO growth and CPI decline are negative or Rank IC < 0.05 over 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A monetary tightening cycle, indicated by rising federal funds rates above 2%, compresses equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20-day returns in periods of FEDFUNDS > 2% are not significantly negative (t-test p > 0.05) or FEDFUNDS fails to exceed 2%.

mechanism_narrative: Strong monthly payroll growth above 150k signals robust labor market conditions, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days via consumer spending optimism.
failure_condition: SPX 20-day returns in periods of PAYEMS > 150k are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05) or PAYEMS fails to exceed 150k.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in consumer spending and housing starts indicates rising demand, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days through sectoral earnings momentum.
failure_condition: SPX 20-day returns in periods of RSAFS and HOUST growth are negative or Rank IC < 0.05 over 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A rebound in industrial production following a contraction signals recovery in supply chains, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days as corporate margins stabilize.
failure_condition: SPX 60-day returns in periods of INDPRO rebound are negative or INDPRO fails to exceed 100.5.

mechanism_narrative: A combination of rising federal funds rates and low unemployment signals aggressive monetary tightening amid a strong labor market, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5-day returns in periods of FEDFUNDS rise and UNRATE < 4.5% are not significantly negative (t-test p > 0.05) or conditions fail to occur.
